auth.signInDescription: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.createAccountDescription: Enter your information to create your account
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters long
auth.welcomeBackDescription: You have been successfully logged in.
auth.passwordMismatchDescription: Passwords do not match. Please try again.
auth.passwordTooShortDescription: Password must be at least {min} characters long.
auth.accountCreatedDescription: Your account has been created successfully.

activities.title: Today's Activities
activities.description: Track and complete your activities for today
activities.createToSeeHere: Create activities to see them appear here on their scheduled days.
activities.tryAdjustingFilters: Try adjusting your filters or create new activities.
activities.noDayTimeScheduled: You don't have any {dayTime} activities scheduled.
activities.activityAlreadyCompleted: This activity is already completed for {date}!
activities.activityDeletedDescription: The activity has been successfully deleted.
activities.showForDate: Show activities scheduled for a specific date

createActivity.title: Create New Activity
createActivity.description: Add a new activity to track your progress and build better habits.
createActivity.selectDayError: Please select at least one day for weekly activities.
createActivity.activityCreatedDescription: Your new activity has been successfully created.

finance.title: Finance
finance.getStarted: Get started by creating your first {type} transaction.
finance.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your filters or create new transactions.
finance.transactionDeletedDescription: The transaction has been successfully deleted.

createTransaction.descriptionFixed: Create a recurring transaction. You can add payments to it later.
createTransaction.descriptionNew: Add a new transaction to track your finances.
createTransaction.paymentFrequencyHint: How often you need to make payments for this transaction
createTransaction.invalidAmountError: Please enter a valid amount greater than 0.
createTransaction.fixedCreatedDescription: Your fixed transaction has been created. You can now add payments to it.
createTransaction.variableCreatedDescription: Your transaction has been successfully created.

paymentModal.title: Record Payment
paymentModal.descriptionIncome: Add a payment for this fixed income.
paymentModal.descriptionExpense: Add a payment for this fixed expense.
paymentModal.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount greater than 0.

time.title: Time Tracking
time.noEntriesMatch: No time entries match your filters
time.startRecordingOrLog: Start recording your time or log an entry manually.
time.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your filters or log new time entries.
time.recordDeletedDescription: The time entry has been deleted.
time.categoryRequiredDescription: Please select a category before starting the timer.

notes.title: Notes
notes.unsavedChangesSwitch: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to switch notes?
notes.unsavedChangesBack: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to go back?
notes.unsavedChangesCreate: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to create a new note?
notes.selectNoteDescription: Choose a note from the list or create a new one
notes.draftRestoredDescription: Your unsaved changes have been restored.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage your account settings and preferences
profile.pictureSizeHint: JPG, PNG or WebP. Max size 10MB.
profile.emailChangeHint: You can change your email in Account Information below.
profile.viewAccountDetails: View your account details and manage security
profile.profileUpdatedDescription: Your profile has been successfully updated.
profile.profilePictureUpdatedDescription: Your profile picture has been successfully updated.
profile.signedOutDescription: You have been successfully signed out.

updatePassword.title: Update Password
updatePassword.description: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
updatePassword.minLength: Must be at least 6 characters long.
updatePassword.passwordsDoNotMatchDescription: Please make sure your new passwords match.
updatePassword.passwordTooShortDescription: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
updatePassword.passwordUpdatedDescription: Your password has been successfully updated.

updateEmail.title: Update Email
updateEmail.description: Enter your password and the new email address you want to use.
updateEmail.passwordHint: Enter your password to confirm this change.
updateEmail.sameEmailDescription: The new email is the same as your current email.
updateEmail.emailUpdatedDescription: Your email has been successfully updated.

deleteModal.areYouSure: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This will permanently remove it from your records.
